---
title: Color-Perception-Guided Display Power Reduction for Virtual Reality
author:
- Budmonde Duinkharjav
- Kenneth Chen
- Abhishek Tyagi
- Jiayi He
- Yuhao Zhu
- Qi Sun
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
- human_perception
url_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3550454.3555473
code_source: https://github.com/NYU-ICL/vr-power-saver
journ: SIGGRAPH Asia (TOG)
year: 2022
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
teaser: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bcbG_80TLa0
pub_number: 65
---
